subcodes.first_line: We have verily informed you aforetime in the Tablets concerning that which hath been decreed by One Who is All-Knowing, All-Wise. He hath, in truth, decreed, and We [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخبرناکم من قبل فی الالواح بما یقضی من لدن علیم حکیم انه قضی بالحق و نحن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
